Best Norway Tour Packages from India – Explore the Land of Fjords and Northern Lights

Embark on a breathtaking journey with the best Norway tour packages from India, where dramatic fjords, Viking heritage, and celestial auroras redefine your idea of wonder. Whether you’re departing from metro cities like Mumbai or seeking a Norway tour package from Kolkata, Travelxploria, your trusted best international travel agents in Kolkata and best tour and travel company in India, transforms each itinerary into an extraordinary travel story.

Why Choose Norway for Your Next International Trip from India?

Stunning Fjords, Glaciers, and Coastal Landscapes
Norway is nature’s masterpiece—where turquoise fjords like Geirangerfjord plunge between towering cliffs and ancient glaciers meet lush valleys. Cruise into the majestic Sognefjord or hike along the Lysefjord to Preikestolen, with Travelxploria’s guides leading the way. These unforgettable experiences are woven into every budget Norway tour itinerary from India.

Experience the Midnight Sun and Northern Lights
Imagine basking in the golden glow of the Midnight Sun in the Lofoten Islands or witnessing the ethereal Northern Lights in Tromsø. Travelxploria’s Norway northern lights tour package from India at affordable cost lets you chase the auroras from heated glass igloos or private snowmobile safaris. Our packages, popular among those booking honeymoon packages from Kolkata, are designed for both romance and adventure.

Ideal for Adventure, Nature, and Culture Enthusiasts
From kayaking Arctic coastlines to exploring Viking museums in Oslo, Norway has something for every traveler. Whether you’re a thrill-seeker, history buff, or honeymooner, our curated experiences are tailored to fit all needs—including the Norway honeymoon tour packages from India at best price. No wonder we're counted among the best tour and travel company names in international travel.

Top Norway Tour Packages from India

7 Days Norway Tour Package from India – Oslo, Bergen & Fjord Cruise
This compact yet immersive tour covers the essentials. Start in Oslo with guided visits to the Fram Museum and Akershus Fortress. In Bergen, cruise the fjords and admire the timbered Bryggen houses. Enjoy a Flam Railway ride and witness Kjosfossen Falls, where folklore and nature meet.

Norway Honeymoon Tour Packages from India
Couples will fall in love all over again under the northern lights. With our Norway honeymoon tour packages from India at best price, enjoy exclusive stays in rorbuer cabins, candlelit dinners on fjord cruises, and prosecco toasts beneath the aurora borealis—all arranged by Travelxploria’s expert honeymoon planners, one of the best travel agency for international travel.

Budget-Friendly Norway Tour Packages for Indian Travelers
Explore the fjords, railways, and Arctic without stretching your wallet. Our affordable Norway tour packages from India combine scenic adventures with smart planning. Ideal for travelers seeking a budget Norway tour itinerary from India that doesn’t compromise on experience.

Customized Norway Tour Itineraries for Families and Groups
Whether it's spotting seals on a Sognefjord cruise or enjoying hot cocoa by a Tromsø campfire, families can bond over magical experiences. Groups can customize their trip with internal flights, train rides, and multi-city excursions—all handled by your trusted Norway tour package from Kolkata operator, Travelxploria, proudly recognized as the best tours and travel agency in India.

Popular Destinations Included in Norway Tour Packages

Oslo – Capital City with Museums, Architecture & Nightlife
Begin your journey in Oslo’s sleek waterfront, where modern design meets Viking history. Explore the Fram Museum, Akershus Fortress, and vibrant seafood scenes curated just for you.

Bergen – Gateway to the Fjords
This colorful coastal city sets the stage for scenic cruises into Sognefjord. Stroll along Bryggen’s UNESCO-listed wharf and ride the Fløibanen funicular for panoramic views.

Tromsø – Arctic Adventures and Northern Lights
As part of our Norway northern lights tour package from India at affordable cost, Tromsø is your launchpad into the Arctic. Expect husky sled rides, reindeer encounters, and glass-domed igloos that let you sleep beneath the aurora.

Flam – Scenic Railway and Fjord Exploration
Ride the Flam Railway, one of the world’s most spectacular train journeys, winding through waterfalls and verdant valleys. Stop at Kjosfossen Falls to witness a mystical Huldra dance—a highlight of our cultural experiences.

Geirangerfjord – UNESCO World Heritage Site
No best Norway tour packages from India are complete without this majestic fjord. Board sightseeing cruises to admire the Seven Sisters waterfall and steep cliffs shaped by time and ice.

What’s Included in the Best Norway Tour Packages from India?

Round-Trip International Flights and Airport Transfers
Seamless travel from India to Norway with all transfers handled by Travelxploria, including popular routes for those booking a Norway tour package from Kolkata or other major cities.

Hotel Accommodation with Daily Breakfast
Stay in handpicked hotels—from modern Oslo properties to cozy rorbuer cabins in Lofoten—paired with daily breakfasts to fuel your explorations.

Internal Transfers – Train, Cruise, or Flights
Your budget Norway tour itinerary from India includes domestic flights, fjord cruises, and iconic rail journeys like Flam and Bergen to Oslo.

Guided Sightseeing and Optional Adventure Activities
Our expert guides provide rich local insights while optional adventures—from kayaking to snowmobiling—add depth to your journey.

Best Time to Visit Norway from India

Summer (May to August) – For Cruises and the Midnight Sun
This is the best time for fjord cruises, hiking, and enjoying long daylight hours. Perfect for scenic lovers and families booking honeymoon packages or group tours.

Winter (November to February) – For Northern Lights and Skiing
Ideal for the Norway northern lights tour package from India at affordable cost, winter brings dramatic Arctic beauty, snow sports, and aurora views.

Travel Tips for Off-Season and Shoulder Seasons
Spring (April) and autumn (September–October) offer fewer crowds and better deals, especially for affordable Norway tour packages from India. Consider packing thermal wear and waterproof gear regardless of season.

Indian citizens need a Schengen visa. Travelxploria, a travel agency for international travel, provides full support with documentation, appointments, and insurance to make the process smooth.

Absolutely! Our customized tours allow extensions to Sweden, Denmark, or Finland. This is ideal if you’re booking from regional cities like Chennai or looking for an extended Norway tour package from Kolkata.

Yes! Our honeymoon itineraries include romantic fjord stays, aurora dinners, and exclusive perks—all available at competitive pricing. Perfect for those looking for honeymoon packages from Kolkata and other metro cities.

Is the Norway northern lights tour package from India at affordable cost suitable for families?
Yes. While tailored for aurora seekers, our Arctic experiences also cater to families with activities like wildlife spotting, campfire evenings, and snow games.

How to Book the Best Norway Tour Packages from India

With your entrance ticket, step into a world of rejuvenation as you explore the beautifully designed neo-baroque architecture and soak in the mineral-rich thermal waters sourced from natural hot springs. Choose from a variety of indoor and outdoor pools, saunas, and steam rooms, perfect for unwinding after a day of sightseeing. Whether you're easing travel fatigue or simply indulging in wellness, the Széchenyi Spa offers a quintessential Budapest experience, blending history, health, and luxury in a truly unique setting.

Discover the elegance and imperial grandeur of Austria’s capital on a comprehensive Vienna city tour that includes entrance to the majestic Schönbrunn Palace. Begin by exploring Vienna’s most iconic landmarks such as the Ringstrasse, Hofburg Palace, St. Stephen’s Cathedral, and the Vienna State Opera, while learning about the city’s rich Habsburg history and cultural legacy. The highlight of the tour is a guided visit to Schönbrunn Palace, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, where you’ll walk through opulent state rooms and beautifully maintained gardens. This immersive experience offers a perfect blend of history, architecture, and royal charm, showcasing Vienna’s timeless allure.

Take this opportunity to explore at your own pace—perhaps stroll through the charming streets of the Old Town, relax at a traditional Viennese café with a slice of Sachertorte, or visit one of the city’s many renowned museums or galleries. Just a short drive from Prague, embark on a magical day trip to Cesky Krumlov, a UNESCO World Heritage site, with the best on-ground support from Travelxploria. This fairy-tale town boasts a well-preserved medieval center, charming cobblestone streets, and a breathtaking castle overlooking the Vltava River. Stroll through its winding alleys, admire the picturesque architecture, and soak in the scenic river views. Finally, we’ll arrive in Oslo with free time to explore the port, main streets, and the artwork in Frogner Park.

packages.package_name: Timeless Europe A Tour of History Art and Nature
packages.overview:
• Frankfurt, Germany: A dynamic financial hub with a blend of modern skyscrapers and historic architecture. Visit the Römer, St. Bartholomew's Cathedral, and explore the charming old town (Altstadt).

  • Dortmund, Germany: Known for its football culture and industrial heritage, Dortmund offers attractions like the Signal Iduna Park, the German Football Museum, and the Westfalenpark with its stunning views.

  • Hanover, Germany: A city rich in history and culture, home to magnificent gardens like Herrenhausen Gardens, the Lower Saxony State Museum, and a lively arts scene.

  • Aarhus, Denmark: A city where the past meets the future, with attractions like the ARoS Aarhus Art Museum, the Old Town (Den Gamle By), and vibrant waterfront areas.

  • Stavanger, Norway: A coastal city famous for its stunning natural beauty, including the famous Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock). Explore its charming old town and fascinating Viking history.

  • Bergen, Norway: Nestled between mountains and fjords, Bergen offers picturesque streets, the UNESCO World Heritage-listed Bryggen, and access to stunning fjord cruises.

  • Oslo, Norway: Norway’s capital is known for its vibrant cultural scene, including the Viking Ship Museum, the Munch Museum, and the beautiful Oslofjord, offering a perfect mix of urban life and nature.

  • Stockholm, Sweden: A city spread across 14 islands, known for its beautiful architecture, world-class museums like the Vasa Museum, and vibrant district of Gamla Stan (Old Town).

  • Copenhagen, Denmark: Denmark’s capital is a mix of royal history, modern design, and Scandinavian charm. Must-visit attractions include Tivoli Gardens, Nyhavn, and the iconic Little Mermaid statue.

  • Berlin, Germany: A city that blends history and modernity, Berlin is known for its rich cultural heritage, the Berlin Wall remnants, Brandenburg Gate, Museum Island, and a vibrant nightlife scene.

Today, we’ll explore the Rhine and Moselle Valleys, two rivers full of history and dotted with charming villages. We´ll begin with a short cruise on the Rhine, between the villages of Rüdesheim and Sankt Goar, undoubtedly the most picturesque section of the river. Next, we’ll head to the Moselle River, stopping for lunch in Cochem, a picturesque village on the Rhine riverbank overlooked by its imposing castle, which dates back over a thousand years. Afterward, we’ll travel to Cologne, where you´ll have time to visit its impressive Gothic cathedral. Standing at 154 meters tall, it was the tallest building in the world until the late 19th century. You can also enjoy a walk along the Rhine River and through the lively city center before we continue to our hotel in Dortmund.

Today, we’ll embark on a magical journey, reminiscing about our favorite childhood stories and movies as we travel through the towns that inspired the Brothers Grimm, now known as the Fairy Tale Route. Our first stop will be Trendelburg, a picturesque walled village where we’ll visit the large medieval castle and the famous Rapunzel Tower (admission included).


We’ll continue along scenic roads, crossing forests that will remind us of the tale of Hansel and Gretel. Our next stop will be Höxter, a vibrant town where we’ll enjoy lunch and visit Corvey Abbey, an ancient 9th-century monastery and World Heritage Site (admission included). packages.package_name: From Frankfurt to Copenhagen: A Pan-European Odyssey
packages.overview:
• Frankfurt – A dynamic blend of modern skyscrapers and historic charm welcomes you to this vibrant German metropolis.
  • Rhine River Cruise – Sail through fairy-tale landscapes, passing medieval castles and lush vineyards along the picturesque riverbanks.
  • Cochem Castle – A majestic fortress perched above the Moselle River, offering breathtaking views and medieval charm.
  • Cologne Cathedral – Marvel at this towering Gothic masterpiece, once the world’s tallest building, dominating the city skyline.
  • Fairy Tale Route – Wander through storybook villages, visiting Rapunzel’s Tower and the legendary Pied Piper’s Hamelin.
  • Hamburg – Discover Germany’s lively port city, with its striking architecture, bustling waterfront, and maritime heritage.
  • Stavanger – Stroll through this picturesque Norwegian town, renowned for its fjordside charm and Viking history.
  • Bergen & Fløyen Viewpoint – Ride the cable car for panoramic views of Norway’s stunning fjords and colorful harbor.
  • Sognefjord Cruise – Glide through Norway’s largest and most spectacular fjord, surrounded by majestic mountains and waterfalls.
  • Oslo & Frogner Park – Explore Norway’s stylish capital, home to grand palaces, modern architecture, and Vigeland’s iconic sculptures.
  • Stockholm & Gamla Stan – Discover Sweden’s enchanting capital, built on 14 islands, with cobbled streets and royal grandeur.
  • Helsingor & Kronborg Castle – Step into Shakespeare’s world at Hamlet’s legendary castle on the Danish coastline.
  • Copenhagen & Nyhavn – Experience Denmark’s capital, where colorful harbor houses and royal landmarks exude Nordic charm.

Today, we’ll explore the Rhine and Moselle Valleys, two rivers full of history and dotted with charming villages. We´ll begin with a short cruise on the Rhine, between the villages of Rüdesheim and Sankt Goar, undoubtedly the most picturesque section of the river. Next, we’ll head to the Moselle River, stopping for lunch in Cochem, a picturesque village on the Rhine riverbank overlooked by its imposing castle, which dates back over a thousand years. Afterward, we’ll travel to Cologne, where you´ll have time to visit its impressive Gothic cathedral. Standing at 154 meters tall, it was the tallest building in the world until the late 19th century. You can also enjoy a walk along the Rhine River and through the lively city center before we continue to our hotel in Dortmund.

Today, we’ll embark on a magical journey, reminiscing about our favorite childhood stories and movies as we travel through the towns that inspired the Brothers Grimm, now known as the Fairy Tale Route. Our first stop will be Trendelburg, a picturesque walled village where we’ll visit the large medieval castle and the famous Rapunzel Tower (admission included).



We’ll continue along scenic roads, crossing forests that will remind us of the tale of Hansel and Gretel. Our next stop will be Höxter, a vibrant town where we’ll enjoy lunch and visit Corvey Abbey, an ancient 9th-century monastery and World Heritage Site (admission included). We’ll then make a brief stop in Polle to photograph the exterior ruins of Cinderella’s Castle. Our journey will continue to Hamelin, renowned for the tale of “The Pied Piper of Hamelin”. After following the mouse tracks, we’ll proceed to Hanover, where we’ll have time to explore the city center and take a stroll next to the old town hall.

Why Choose Norway for Your Next International Trip from India?

Stunning Fjords, Glaciers, and Coastal Landscapes

No wonder we're counted among the best tour and travel company names in international travel.

This compact yet immersive tour covers the essentials. Start in Oslo with guided visits to the Fram Museum and Akershus Fortress. In Bergen, cruise the fjords and admire the timbered Bryggen houses. Enjoy a Flam Railway ride and witness Kjosfossen Falls, where folklore and nature meet.

Norway Honeymoon Tour Packages from India
Couples will fall in love all over again under the northern lights. With our Norway honeymoon tour packages from India at best price, enjoy exclusive stays in rorbuer cabins, candlelit dinners on fjord cruises, and prosecco toasts beneath the aurora borealis—all arranged by Travelxploria’s expert honeymoon planners, one of the best travel agency for international travel.

Explore the fjords, railways, and Arctic without stretching your wallet. Our affordable Norway tour packages from India combine scenic adventures with smart planning. Ideal for travelers seeking a budget Norway tour itinerary from India that doesn’t compromise on experience.

Customized Norway Tour Itineraries for Families and Groups

Groups can customize their trip with internal flights, train rides, and multi-city excursions—all handled by your trusted Norway tour package from Kolkata operator, Travelxploria, proudly recognized as the best tours and travel agency in India.

Popular Destinations Included in Norway Tour Packages

Begin your journey in Oslo’s sleek waterfront, where modern design meets Viking history. Explore the Fram Museum, Akershus Fortress, and vibrant seafood scenes curated just for you.

Bergen – Gateway to the Fjords
This colorful coastal city sets the stage for scenic cruises into Sognefjord. Stroll along Bryggen’s UNESCO-listed wharf and ride the Fløibanen funicular for panoramic views.

Tromsø – Arctic Adventures and Northern Lights
As part of our Norway northern lights tour package from India at affordable cost, Tromsø is your launchpad into the Arctic. Expect husky sled rides, reindeer encounters, and glass-domed igloos that let you sleep beneath the aurora.

Flam – Scenic Railway and Fjord Exploration
Ride the Flam Railway, one of the world’s most spectacular train journeys, winding through waterfalls and verdant valleys. Stop at Kjosfossen Falls to witness a mystical Huldra dance—a highlight of our cultural experiences.

Geirangerfjord – UNESCO World Heritage Site
No best Norway tour packages from India are complete without this majestic fjord. Board sightseeing cruises to admire the Seven Sisters waterfall and steep cliffs shaped by time and ice.

This is the best time for fjord cruises, hiking, and enjoying long daylight hours. Perfect for scenic lovers and families booking honeymoon packages or group tours.
